note: Each value is Criterion's typical estimate (the regression slope for linear-sampled benches, otherwise the mean) over 100 samples after warmup, matching Criterion's own `time:` line. `xtask perf-check` reads the fresh estimates under $CARGO_TARGET_DIR/criterion/<criterion>/new/estimates.json and fails if any benchmark exceeds its baseline by more than tolerance_pct. Run `cargo bench --workspace` first.
